thinking:
**Identifying Key Components**

I've pinpointed the key components within `features-section-14.tsx`. I see a badge that says "Our Features" and an H2 headline: "Offer your clients a better retainer experience, scale your agency."


**Revising Section Details**

I'm now changing the section focus to "Integrations." The badge will read ":: INTEGRATIONS ::" in the specified green style, and the H2 headline will be "Plays nicely with your stack." The subtext will become: "Connect AI Greentick with 100+ tools — your CRM, store, and automation platform are one click away." A logo grid, including Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Salesforce, and others is now the focus, with a "View all integrations →" CTA. I'm noting the image is the existing Animated Beam diagram.


**Designing Integration Grid**

I'm now focused on designing the integrations logo grid. I'm considering grid layouts that match the site's aesthetic: light/dark cells, clean borders, and appropriate logos. I plan to use a grid of 12 cells, responsive across mobile, small, and large screens, incorporating a "View all integrations →" CTA.


**Crafting Visual Representation**

I'm now determining logo representations. I'm considering simple logos, clean icons, or line-art styles. I've decided on high-quality, consistent logos or SVGs for each service, aiming for a premium and clean aesthetic within each integration cell, ensuring a visual consistency. I'm designing a continuous border grid, and I want to center the logos and names. I'll include a responsive grid layout with a CTA. I have the logos.


**Generating Custom SVGs**

I'm now generating custom SVGs or icons for each integration. I'm focusing on Lucide icons, customizing colors and shapes for visual consistency. I've designed icons for Shopify (Green ShoppingBag), WooCommerce (Purple Workflow), HubSpot (Orange Hub or GitMerge), and other integrations, ensuring a premium aesthetic. This approach is creative, reliable, fast, and independent of external URLs.


**Crafting Integration Icons**

I'm now writing clean inline SVGs for the actual logos, as they're simple and recognizable. I'm focusing on crafting elegant SVG paths or stylized modern versions to ensure a uniform and premium look. I've drafted a logo grid and am considering using Lucide icons for visual consistency. I'm now defining a data array of integrations. I have also added descriptions of each integration.



**Refining Grid Elements**

I'm now refining the integration grid elements to enhance their visual appeal and user interaction. I'll render the logo icon and name within a clean card design: the card will be `h-28` (or `h-24` on mobile) with a border and white background. On hover, the background will become a light green tint, the icon will scale slightly, and the title text will turn green, creating a cohesive and premium look. I've been reviewing the layout and determined the Animated Beam Diagram container should be replaced by the grid. I will also add a centered CTA button below the grid, for a cohesive integration section.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"implementation_plan","RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan to rebuild FeaturesSection14 into an Integrations section. Includes custom green badge, new header/subtext, a 12-cell logo grid (Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, etc.), and a View All Integrations CTA button."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Rebuild FeaturesSection14 into Integrations Block

Rebuild the [features-section-14.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/components/shadcn-studio/blocks/features-section-14/features-section-14.tsx) component to present an Integrations section instead of the default features animated beam layout.

## Proposed Changes

### Integrations Block

#### [MODIFY] [features-section-14.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/components/shadcn-studio/blocks/features-section-14/features-section-14.tsx)
- **Header Section**:
  - Replace the current badge with a custom green badge: `:: INTEGRATIONS ::`.
  - Set main heading (H2) to: `Plays nicely with your stack`.
  - Set subtext description to: `Connect AI Greentick with 100+ tools — your CRM, store, and automation platform are one click away.`.
- **Integrations Logo Grid**:
  - Implement a 12-card continuous border logo grid (`grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 border-l border-t border-[#C5C4C2]`).
  - Populate the grid with the 12 requested integrations: Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Razorpay, Zapier, Google Sheets, Pabbly, Make, Klaviyo, Calendly.
  - Style each cell with a light grey/white background, center-aligned custom icon and name, and hover interactive effects (tinted green background, scaled icon, green colored text).
- **CTA Button**:
  - Centered below the logo grid, add a clean monospace button: `View all integrations →` with transition states.

## Verification Plan

### Automated Tests
- Run `npm run build` to verify there are no TypeScript compile errors.

### Manual Verification
- Verify the logo grid rendering, hover states, and responsive column structure in the browser.
"
args.Description: "Create implementation plan to rebuild the features-section-14 block into an integrations block."
